dismissalText.commentary: Ajinkya Rahane c Mohammed Shami b Rathi 41 (24b 4x4 2x6 50m) SR: 170.83

dismissalComment.html: has that carried?! Looks like it has, and Shami throws away the ball to the umpire rather nonchalantly! Rahane asked to wait, though! Dragged down outside off. Rahane winds up and hacks it flat towards mid wicket, where Shami lunges low to his right and seems to gobble it up cleanly. The third umpire has been called into question this time, and it seems like his fingers are underneath the ball. Third umpire taking multiple looks, and he concludes it is a clean catch. Right call made, and Rahane has to go!

dismissalText.commentary: Finn Allen c Rathi b Prince Yadav 9 (8b 2x4 0x6 8m) SR: 112.5

dismissalComment.html: goes a mile up, and taken on the fence! Hard length just outside off and this seems to rear up slightly. A bit of away movement too and Allen, mowing across the line, gets a massive top edge. Rathi settles himself on the deep third fence and takes it smartly to his left, while standing right on the fence. Top grab, and LSG's powerplay incision continues. But hang on, replays suggest that Rathi was perilously close to touching the skirting. There was not an extensive check. Maybe there should have been one. A slight suggestion that one of the cushion may just have moved. Well well...

dismissalText.commentary: Angkrish Raghuvanshi c Markram b Siddharth 45 (33b 5x4 2x6 47m) SR: 136.36

dismissalComment.html: holes out to long on, and LSG's spinners are applying the squeeze! Speared in full on leg. Raghuvanshi skips down but gets too close to the ball. Cannot get under it enough and arrows it straight down Markram's throat. KKR lose two in quick succession, and LSG now have a more than decent foothold in this contest!

dismissalText.commentary: Rinku Singh b Avesh Khan 4 (7b 0x4 0x6 8m) SR: 57.14

dismissalComment.html: knocks him over with a ripper, and Rinku is outta here! Back of a length, angling into off. On pitching, though, it decks away just a shade. Rinku tries to poke at it but is beaten by the movement against the angle. Off stump pegged back, and KKR losing their way here!

dismissalText.commentary: Ajinkya Rahane c Mohammed Shami b Rathi 41 (24b 4x4 2x6 50m) SR: 170.83

dismissalComment.html: has that carried?! Looks like it has, and Shami throws away the ball to the umpire rather nonchalantly! Rahane asked to wait, though! Dragged down outside off. Rahane winds up and hacks it flat towards mid wicket, where Shami lunges low to his right and seems to gobble it up cleanly. The third umpire has been called into question this time, and it seems like his fingers are underneath the ball. Third umpire taking multiple looks, and he concludes it is a clean catch. Right call made, and Rahane has to go!

dismissalText.commentary: Rishabh Pant c Kartik Tyagi b Green 10 (9b 1x4 0x6 23m) SR: 111.11

dismissalComment.html: Pant miscues a pull, and KKR's million-dollar buy delivers with the ball straightaway! Short and finishing just outside off. Pant has a swipe at it but has to fetch it from around his back shoulder. Skews it tamely off the top edge and Tyagi, moving to his right from short fine leg, makes no mistake. Green is thrilled to bits, and LSG in a spot of bother now!

dismissalText.commentary: Nicholas Pooran c Ramandeep Singh b Kartik Tyagi 13 (15b 0x4 1x6 19m) SR: 86.66

dismissalComment.html: yet another LSG batter falls to the short ball! Bashed into the track just outside off. Pooran looks to swipe it out of sight but makes a mess of it. Shanks it terribly and Ramandeep, stood well inside the long on fence, accepts the offering with glee. LSG falling apart now!

dismissalText.commentary: Abdul Samad b Roy 2 (4b 0x4 0x6 5m) SR: 50

dismissalComment.html: through him, and Samad has to walk too! Slowed up on a fullish length on middle and off. Samad is enticed into a slog and loses his shape a tad. Misses the ball completely as it slides in with the angle. The ball kisses the back leg and then thuds into the stumps. LSG in all sorts of trouble now!

dismissalText.commentary: Ayush Badoni c Singh b Roy 54 (34b 7x4 2x6 56m) SR: 158.82

dismissalComment.html: chipped straight to long off, and is that the game?! This is brave and beautiful bowling. Hung up wider and given just enough air to tempt Badoni into the inside-out lofted drive. He has to reach out in front too much, though, and all he manages is a chip into Rinku's palms. Anukul with another major breakthrough, and LSG's chase is flagging!

dismissalText.commentary: Mohammed Shami c Roy b Narine 1 (3b 0x4 0x6 5m) SR: 33.33

dismissalComment.html: Shami slogs and Shami falls! Narine doing his thing again. Slows it up on a length on off. Shami has had enough of the defensive play and swings at it with all his might. Drags it a little, though, and deep square leg does not have to move a muscle. Narine celebrates, and that is a sight you do not see very often. LSG on the brink!
